faqs.a: Yes, we provide both in-person and virtual design services.

faqs.q: How long does a typical project take?
faqs.a: Project timelines vary based on scope but typically range from 4 to 12 weeks.

faqs.q: Can you help with furniture sourcing?
faqs.a: Absolutely, we can assist in selecting and purchasing the perfect pieces for your home.
We primarily serve clients within a 30-mile radius of our office location.
